title: Surgeon Vacancy at Jaypee Hospital - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Jaypee Hospital - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Jaypee Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Surgeon to strengthen our Gwalior-based team.

About Jaypee Hospital:
Jaypee Hospital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jaypee Hospital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
